{{Infobox character
| name = the stranger (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The stranger is a young man with a [[Remnant prosthetic]] right arm made of white light.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The stranger wears a pin with a green cloud emblem of the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The stranger's [[madra]] is described as being like a pure, untainted spring.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
